Vlm.title: VLM Access
Vlm.description: VLM is Velmère's access layer for private drops, archive access and selected brand privileges. The official registry defines contract data, access rules and security records.
Vlm.legalNote: VLM is an access-token interface. The official registry defines contract data, route, audit records and access rules. This page is not investment advice and does not promise profit, listing, liquidity, resale value, scarcity or yield.
Vlm.auditNote: Security review is required before registry publication. The page does not claim an audit, deployed contract or live market access.
Vlm.visualExplanation: Visual simulation of the access layer. Audit and implementation required before production use.
Vlm.walletBody: Wallet support is shown as a readiness state only. Users keep custody in their own wallets. Purchase is blocked until contract, legal review, audit and launch configuration are complete.
Vlm.utilityBody: VLM is designed as an access layer for brand experiences: private drops, archive unlocking and selected privileges.
Vlm.cryptoRegulationNote: VLM may be subject to crypto-asset regulation depending on final structure, jurisdiction, distribution model and functionality. Legal review and MiCA review are required before launch.

basic.title: VLM Access
basic.body: VLM connects archive pieces, private drops and selected Velmère community functions through a future wallet-owned access layer.

wallet.title: Wallet-owned access.
wallet.body: VLM is designed for non-custodial wallets. Velmère never stores seed phrases, private keys or user funds.

risk.title: Clear boundaries.
risk.body: There is no public sale yet, no deployed contract and no audit. This page is not investment advice and does not promise profit.

how.title: How buying would work after launch.
how.body: The purchase path stays disabled until the contract, audit and official pool exist.

steps.wallet: Install MetaMask or another supported non-custodial wallet.
steps.verify: Verify the official contract address on Velmère and the block explorer.
steps.pool: Use the official VLM page and approved pool only after launch.

archive.body: Selected pieces outside the public drop.

proVisual.body: EVM MVP path, audit lock, multisig treasury and Bajak signal layer in one controlled launch diagram.

terms.title: Terms
terms.draftNotice: Template copy. Replace all Seller details before accepting orders.
terms.intro: These Terms apply to clothing purchases from Velmère. VLM access, wallet features and Square community features are separate from clothing checkout unless clearly stated before purchase.

sections.title: Seller and contact
sections.body:
Seller: Marcin Bajak / Velmère
Address: Germany — full legal address to be confirmed in merchant records before public order activation
Email: velmere141@gmail.com
Business registration/VAT: not published until applicable registration/VAT data is confirmed

sections.title: Contract formation
sections.body: A binding order is formed only after the customer submits the order, payment is confirmed and Velmère sends an order confirmation. Automated receipt emails do not replace the final acceptance wording unless the checkout flow states otherwise.

sections.title: Products, drops and availability
sections.body: Products may be limited. Product pages should show material, fit, size information, price, taxes, availability, delivery estimate and return information before checkout. If an item is not available yet, use clear wording such as “Not available for purchase yet” or “Drop date to be announced.”

sections.title: Prices, taxes and payment
sections.body: Prices are shown in EUR unless another currency is clearly displayed. Taxes, delivery costs and payment methods must be shown before the customer places a binding order. Card details should be handled by the payment provider, not stored by Velmère.

sections.title: Shipping and delivery
sections.body: Delivery regions, carriers, fulfilment partners, shipping costs, tracking and estimated delivery windows are described in the Shipping Policy and shown before checkout.

sections.title: Returns and withdrawal
sections.body: Consumer withdrawal rights and return instructions are described in the Returns / Right of Withdrawal Policy. Consumer rights remain unaffected.

sections.title: Accounts
sections.body: Accounts may be used for order history, addresses, Square publishing, support and optional wallet binding. Users must keep login credentials secure and may not impersonate others, abuse the service or submit illegal content.

sections.title: Wallet and VLM separation
sections.body: Clothing checkout does not require VLM. VLM is described as a utility/access concept only. It is not financial advice, a security, a public offer, a price claim or a promise of future access, value, liquidity or listing.

sections.title: Square community
sections.body: Square posts, comments and reports may be moderated. Velmère may remove content or restrict accounts that publish harassment, impersonation, illegal content, scams, seed phrase requests or misleading financial claims.

sections.title: Warranty and consumer rights
sections.body: Statutory conformity and warranty rights for consumers remain unaffected. Any limitation of liability must be valid under applicable law and shown clearly.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.draftNotice: Template copy. Replace controller, processor and retention fields before launch.
privacy.intro: This policy explains how Velmère may process personal data for the store, accounts, checkout, support, Square and optional wallet access features.

sections.title: Controller
sections.body:
Controller: Marcin Bajak / Velmère
Address: Germany — full legal address to be confirmed in merchant records before public order activation
Email: velmere141@gmail.com

sections.title: Data categories
sections.body: Account data, contact data, order data, shipping and billing data, payment status, support messages, newsletter consent, cookie preferences, device/session data, Square posts/comments/reports and public wallet address data if wallet features are used.

sections.title: Purposes and legal bases
sections.body: Data may be used to provide the store, process orders, deliver products, answer support requests, prevent abuse, comply with legal obligations, remember preferences, send marketing only with consent and verify optional wallet-based access.

sections.title: Processors and recipients
sections.body: Possible processors include hosting provider, payment provider, email provider, fulfilment partner, shipping carrier, analytics provider if enabled with consent, OAuth provider and wallet infrastructure provider. Add final provider names and links before launch.

sections.title: Payments
sections.body: If Stripe or another payment provider is enabled, full card data should be processed by that provider. Velmère should store only order status, payment status and information required for accounting and support.

sections.title: Wallet data
sections.body: Wallet connection may reveal a public wallet address and network information. Velmère must never request, store or process seed phrases or private keys.

sections.title: Square moderation data
sections.body: Square posts, comments, reports, moderation decisions and account restrictions may be stored to operate the community and protect members from abuse.

sections.title: Cookies and consent
sections.body: Essential cookies may be used for cart, account and security. Analytics, marketing pixels, embedded media or non-essential cookies should run only after valid consent where required.

sections.title: Retention
sections.body: Retention periods: order and tax records follow applicable statutory duties; marketing and account records are kept only while needed or until deletion/withdrawal where legally available. Store personal data only as long as necessary for the purpose, legal obligations, dispute handling or security.

sections.title: User rights
sections.body: Users may have rights to access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, objection and withdrawal of consent. Users may also complain to a competent data protection supervisory authority.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.draftNotice: Template copy. Replace regions, rates, carriers and delivery windows before checkout.
shipping.intro: Shipping costs and delivery estimates must be shown before the customer places a binding order.

sections.title: Countries served
sections.body: Germany, EU and selected international regions where the chosen fulfilment carrier can provide delivery. Orders should not be accepted for unsupported destinations.

sections.title: Shipping costs
sections.body: Shipping costs must be shown by destination, carrier and order value before checkout completion.

sections.title: Production and delivery time
sections.body: If a product is made after order, production time is separate from carrier delivery time. Show both timelines before checkout.

sections.title: Carriers and tracking
sections.body: Carrier and fulfilment partner details must be shown where available; tracking should be provided after dispatch.

sections.title: Failed delivery
sections.body: If delivery fails because the address is incorrect or the parcel is not collected, support will review the case and explain reshipment or refund options.

sections.title: Damaged parcel
sections.body: Customers should contact support with order number, photos of the parcel and photos of the product as soon as possible after delivery.

sections.title: Customs and import charges
sections.body: For deliveries outside the EU, customs duties, import taxes or brokerage fees may apply. These costs must be disclosed where legally required before checkout.

returns.title: Returns / Right of Withdrawal
returns.draftNotice: Template copy. Replace return address and final process before accepting orders.
returns.intro: EU consumers generally have a 14-day withdrawal right for online purchases, subject to legal exceptions. Consumer rights remain unaffected.

sections.title: Withdrawal period
sections.body: For goods, the 14-day period generally starts when the customer or a third party chosen by the customer receives the goods.

sections.title: How to withdraw
sections.body: Contact velmere141@gmail.com with order number and a clear withdrawal statement. A dedicated withdrawal button/form should be added if required for the launch jurisdiction.

sections.title: Return address
sections.body: Return destination is provided after return approval so the customer is not sent to an incorrect private/warehouse address.

sections.title: Refund timing
sections.body: Eligible refunds should be issued through the original payment method within the legally required period after withdrawal, subject to the rules on returned goods and proof of return shipment.

sections.title: Return shipping
sections.body: State clearly before purchase whether the customer or Velmère pays return shipping. Customer-paid return shipping applies only if legally valid and properly disclosed.

sections.title: Product condition
sections.body: Returned products should be clean, complete and handled only as necessary to inspect fit, nature and characteristics. Excessive wear may affect refund rights where legally allowed.

sections.title: Exceptions
sections.body: Exceptions for customized, sealed, hygiene-sensitive or made-to-order products may apply only where legally valid and clearly disclosed before purchase.

sections.title: Model withdrawal form
sections.body:
To: Marcin Bajak / Velmère, Germany, velmere141@gmail.com
I/we hereby withdraw from the contract for the following goods:
Ordered on / received on: [date]
Name of consumer: [name]
Address of consumer: [address]
Date: [date]

sections.title: Registration and VAT

sections.title: Responsible person

sections.title: Dispute resolution
sections.body: Consumer dispute-resolution information must match the seller’s exact legal setup and jurisdiction.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: For orders, product questions, privacy requests and Square moderation.

sections.title: Support
sections.body:
Email: velmere141@gmail.com
Response time: normally within 2 business days

sections.title: Orders
sections.body: Include order number, email used for checkout and a short description of the issue.

sections.title: Returns
sections.body: Use the Returns / Right of Withdrawal page for withdrawal instructions and the model form.

sections.title: Wallet safety
sections.body: Never send a seed phrase or private key to support. Velmère will never ask for it.

sections.title: Square reports
sections.body: Report harassment, impersonation, illegal content, scams, seed phrase requests or misleading VLM claims.

token.title: Warunki dostępu VLM
token.draftNotice: Roboczy tekst read-only. Wymaga przeglądu przed jakąkolwiek publiczną aktywacją VLM.
token.intro: VLM jest opisany jako planowana warstwa dostępu i użyteczności dla Velmère. W tej wersji nie działa jako sprzedaż tokena i nie jest przedstawiany jako produkt inwestycyjny.

sections.title: Bez języka inwestycyjnego
sections.body: VLM nie może być komunikowany jako obietnica zysku, odsprzedaży, yield, dywidendy, papier wartościowy ani gwarantowana przyszła korzyść.

sections.title: Bezpieczeństwo portfela
sections.body: Velmère nigdy nie prosi o seed phrase ani klucze prywatne. Każda przyszła akcja wallet musi jasno odróżniać połączenie, podpis wiadomości, approval tokena i transakcję.

sections.title: Status kontraktu
sections.body: Żadna publiczna akcja tokenowa nie jest aktywna, dopóki nie zostaną opublikowane adres kontraktu, chain, ABI, explorer, status audytu i przegląd prawny.

Archive.title: Silhouettes beyond the drop.
Archive.intro: The archive holds pieces outside the public collection. Access may be limited by VLM after full configuration.
Archive.noteBody: Research and system notes are kept secondary so the archive reads as a garment record, not a technical notebook.

coat.title: Long dark shell
coat.body: A controlled outer layer built around line, shadow, and restrained volume.

hood.title: Hooded mass study
hood.body: A study in weight, cropped proportion, and quiet surface tension.

trouser.title: Utility trouser draft
trouser.body: A private archive trouser concept reserved until access rules are finished.

Angel.title: Angel
Angel.welcome: Ask Angel for fit, drop logic, archive mood or the cleanest way through the store.
Angel.fitPrompt: Fit analysis: ask for height, weight, and preferred silhouette, then suggest a Velmère size carefully.
Angel.tokenPrompt: VLM access: explain private drops, archive unlocking and registry-based access without investment advice.
Angel.sidePanelHint: The panel slides from the side and does not block the page. You can keep it open while browsing.

Cookie.message: We use minimal local storage for preferences and essential storefront behavior. Non-essential tracking should stay disabled until consent tooling is configured.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: This path does not exist or has moved into the Velmère archive.

AdminImport.title: Import products
AdminImport.intro: Paste product links, one per line. The system will create drafts that you can review before publishing.
AdminImport.printfulBody: Printful sync uses PRINTFUL_API_TOKEN on the server. Products are imported as drafts and are not published automatically.
AdminImport.tapstitchBody: Tapstitch products should be imported through public product links or CSV. The importer creates review drafts and does not bypass private dashboards or publish products automatically.
AdminImport.aiDescriptionBody: AI description generation is a server-side assist only. It requires OPENAI_API_KEY and every generated description must be reviewed before publication.
AdminImport.previewOnly: Preview created. No database is configured, so drafts are not persisted in production.

VlmVisual.title: CONCEPTUAL VERIFICATION MODULE
VlmVisual.body: Simulation of the access layer. Audit and implementation required before production use.

networks.label: Networks
networks.value: EVM planned MVP / Solana later / Sui later

privateDrops.title: Private drops
privateDrops.body: Potential access to selected Velmère releases after activation.

archive.title: VLM Archive
archive.body: Archive features may be unlocked after access rules are configured.

privileges.title: Selected privileges
privileges.body: Draft privileges may include early information, previews, or private access moments.

voice.title: Community voice
voice.body: Future community feedback mechanics may be introduced after legal and technical review.

earlyAccess.title: Early access
earlyAccess.body: Potential early access to selected drops, without promised allocation or resale value.

communityLayer.title: Experimental community layer
communityLayer.body: A brand experiment around access, identity, and participation, not a financial product claim.

VlmTokenomics.title: Emission allocation model
VlmTokenomics.body: Percentages describe a draft allocation of genesis emission or future mints, not a fixed total supply.
VlmTokenomics.draftNotice: Draft tokenomics - not final. No promised scarcity, profit, liquidity, listing, or market support is promised.

treasury.label: Treasury / brand development
treasury.note: Brand development, access infrastructure, and operational reserves.

team.label: Team / contributor vesting
team.note: Vesting to be defined before launch.

liquidity.label: Liquidity / market operations
liquidity.note: Liquidity is not promised and requires final legal and market review.

VlmSecurity.title: Plan, code, test, audit, deploy, monitor.
VlmSecurity.body: Smart contract security does not come from the website design. It requires implementation, testing, audit and monitoring.

what.a: A planned EVM-first access token for private drops, archive access and selected Velmère privileges.

investment.a: No. VLM is presented as an access layer, not a price claim.

buy.a: No. There is no public sale and no contract address. The buying section explains the future post-launch route.

contract.a: No production contract address is declared. Testnet and audit must happen first.

audit.a: No audit is declared. Independent review is required before full launch.

dynamic.a: No unpublished registry supply data is presented in the public VLM interface. Official data must come from the registry.

networks.a: EVM is the planned MVP path. Solana and Sui remain later or conceptual directions.

holders.a: Potential access to private drops, archive features and selected community functions after activation.

custody.a: Users keep assets in their own wallets. Velmère does not store private keys or seed phrases.

live.a: The page describes the public interface and access model. Purchase and gated functions require deployed contract, registry and audit.

amu.a: AMU = 3162.27766 is a conceptual carrier constant for the visual simulation, not a cryptographic parameter.

bajak.a: Bajak Protocol is a conceptual visual layer for Velmère access design. It does not replace wallet cryptography, smart-contract audits or network security.

security.a: No. It is a visual and conceptual layer. Security depends on wallet custody, contract design, tests, multisig and audit.

fixedSupply.a: The draft model uses 1,000,000,000 VLM with minting disabled after deployment to avoid hidden post-launch minting.

taxes.a: The target draft is 1% entry fee, 2.5% exit fee and 0% transfer tax. The deployed contract must match the official registry.

rho.a: ρ is the plastic constant used for visual harmonic scaling. It is not a cryptographic parameter.

walletCreation.q: Can this page create a wallet?
walletCreation.a: No. Trusted wallet software such as MetaMask creates wallets. This page does not generate keys or seed phrases.

taxesFinal.a: No public trading mechanics are presented here. The official registry controls any future contract and access records.

auditRequired.a: Smart contract security requires implementation, tests, static analysis, independent audit and monitoring.

VlmWallet.title: VLM Access - registry-gated
VlmWallet.body: Wallet connection is a preview state only. Contract deployment, legal review and audit are required before any purchase can exist.
VlmWallet.purchaseLocked: VLM purchase is locked until contract deployment, legal review and audit.

BajakProtocol.aria: Bajak Protocol conceptual prime lattice verification visual
BajakProtocol.title: VLM PROTOCOL LAB — CONCEPTUAL ACCESS LAYER
BajakProtocol.body: A visual access model inspired by numerical structures. Internal research name: Bajak Protocol. It is not a security audit or a smart-contract protection guarantee.

VlmCybersecurity.title: Cybersecurity and audit status
VlmCybersecurity.body: VLM requires a separate security process: architecture design, tests, smart-contract audit, monitoring and clear deployment rules. The current page shows a concept, not production security.

nonCustodial.title: Non-custodial
nonCustodial.body: Users hold assets in their own wallets. Velmère does not store private keys, seed phrases or funds.

noCustomCrypto.title: No custom crypto
noCustomCrypto.body: Velmère does not create custom cryptography or store user keys. VLM is intended to use existing wallets and network standards.

tokenGating.title: Token-gating only
tokenGating.body: Initial utility should read address and balance, then check eligibility. No staking, lending, yield, bridge or random rewards.

messageSigning.title: Clear signatures
messageSigning.body: A signature confirms wallet ownership. It is not a transaction and does not move funds. Future sign-in must include domain, nonce, expiration and server-side verification.

approvalSafety.title: No approvals for access
approvalSafety.body: Token-gating only reads balance. No approval is needed, and unlimited approvals must not be requested by default.

VlmSupply.title: Fixed supply in the launch scenario.
VlmSupply.body: The current draft model uses 1,000,000,000 VLM with minting disabled after deployment. This is a registry-gated scenario, not a public offer.

dynamic.title: Fixed supply
dynamic.body: Total supply in the draft scenario is 1,000,000,000 VLM.

emission.title: One-time mint
emission.body: Supply should be minted once at deployment, with no owner mint after launch.

genesis.title: Genesis mint
genesis.body: Initial allocation and LP must be documented before launch.

governance.title: No future mints
governance.body: If the model changes, it needs new communication, legal review and audit.

burnLock.title: LP / lock policy
burnLock.body: Pool, lock and treasury rules must be validated on testnet.

vesting.title: Vesting / multisig
vesting.body: Admin and treasury roles require multisig before mainnet.

Ai.adminBody: Gemini can help clean imported product drafts, descriptions and alt text. It is server-side only and every result requires human review.

CookieConsent.title: Cookie choices
CookieConsent.message: We use necessary cookies and local storage to run the store. Analytics and marketing will only start after consent.
CookieConsent.settingsIntro: Analytics and marketing are currently disabled unless you opt in. Necessary storage keeps language, cart and consent preferences working.
CookieConsent.necessary: Necessary storage is always active for storefront operation.
CookieConsent.analytics: Analytics cookies only after consent. Currently no analytics tracking is active.
CookieConsent.marketing: Marketing pixels only after consent. Currently no marketing pixels are active.

VlmWalletPreview.title: Podgląd portfela tylko do odczytu
VlmWalletPreview.body: Connect a wallet to preview future access states. VLM purchase remains locked until contract deployment, legal review and audit.
VlmWalletPreview.readOnly: Podgląd tylko do odczytu. Access requires deployed contract and registry.
VlmWalletPreview.noProvider: MetaMask was not detected in this browser.
VlmWalletPreview.connectedHelper: Connected: {address} on {network}. Balance is not read until a contract exists.

states.wrong_network: Switch to EVM testnet/Base after deployment

addressCheck.label: Check public address
addressCheck.empty: Optional public address format preview. Do not enter a seed phrase or private key.
addressCheck.valid: Address format looks valid. Access remains locked until contract deployment.

VlmHowToBuy.title: How VLM would be bought after launch
VlmHowToBuy.body: This is a future safety guide only. There is no contract address, no public sale and no approved pool now.

steps.wallet: Install a non-custodial wallet such as MetaMask.
steps.network: Add the supported EVM network after contract deployment.
steps.officialPage: Open the official Velmère VLM page.
steps.verify: Verify the contract address from the site and block explorer.
steps.dex: Use the approved DEX/pool only after launch.
steps.confirm: Confirm fees and slippage in your wallet.

AmuCore.title: AMU Core
AmuCore.subtitle: 3162.27766 as the conceptual carrier of the VLM Protocol Lab.
AmuCore.body: Within VLM, AMU is not a cryptographic parameter. It is the visual and conceptual core of the simulation: a reference point for the prime lattice, entropy flow and ρ harmonic scaling.
AmuCore.formulaDisclaimer: Conceptual UI formula — not wallet cryptography.

PrimeFieldSimulation.aria: Prime field simulation with Riemann shadow grid

AccessFormula.title: Access Formula
AccessFormula.body: Checks public address, balance, network and access rules.
AccessFormula.disclaimer: Conceptual access model for interface design.

reasons.missingAddress: A public address is missing for the simulation.
reasons.contractNotDeployed: The contract is not deployed, so eligibility cannot run.
reasons.rulesInactive: Access rules are not active before launch.
reasons.auditRequired: Audit and testnet validation are required before activation.

WalletGenesis.title: Non-custodial simulation
WalletGenesis.body: The simulation shows the non-custodial logic: the private key remains inside the user's wallet. Velmère can read the public address and check access, but does not store keys.
WalletGenesis.securityNote: Real wallet creation is handled by trusted wallet software such as MetaMask. This animation does not create a wallet.
WalletGenesis.amuNote: The AMU pulse represents the visual simulation layer. The real private key remains inside the user wallet and is never created by the website.

CybersecurityStack.title: Cybersecurity: visual layer vs real layer
CybersecurityStack.body: The VLM Protocol Lab explains the access concept visually. It does not secure funds. Real security comes from contract design, wallet custody, tests, multisig and audit.

custody.title: Wallet custody
custody.body: Users keep keys. Velmère never stores seed phrases or funds.

visualLayer.title: Visual layer
visualLayer.body: Scientific identity and interface simulations. They give context, but they are not security.

realLayer.title: Real layer
realLayer.body: Required elements before the token can operate safely in production.

BajakProtocolLab.title: Bajak Protocol
BajakProtocolLab.subtitle: Bajak Protocol is a conceptual visual layer for Velmère access design. It does not replace wallet cryptography, smart-contract audits or network security.
BajakProtocolLab.body: Bajak Protocol is a conceptual visual layer for Velmère access design. It does not replace wallet cryptography, smart-contract audits or network security.

rho.label: Rho harmonics
rho.body: ρ shapes the visual growth rings.

primeField.label: Prime Field
primeField.body: Prime nodes form the access lattice.

security.label: Cyber status
security.body: Real security comes from wallets, simple contracts, tests, multisig and audit.

VlmLaunchScenario.title: VLM registry and launch route
VlmLaunchScenario.body: Operational model for the EVM access layer. Public contract and route data are published from the official registry.
VlmLaunchScenario.warning: Public route data is published through the official registry when ready.
VlmLaunchScenario.feeWarning: Trading mechanics must be validated on testnet before public route publication.

VlmAccessHeroVisual.title: LAUNCH ACCESS ENGINE
VlmAccessHeroVisual.body: Readiness preview: AMU pulse, prime nodes and deployment locks. Activation requires contract deployment and audit.

evm.label: EVM

ProductLaunchChecklist.title: Printful / Tapstitch pipeline
ProductLaunchChecklist.body: Imports create drafts. Publish only when validation passes.
requirements: Printful API token server-side; sync products as drafts with variants, images and EUR prices.
Tapstitch via CSV, public URL import or manual mapping fallback.
AI description cleanup via Angel/admin route in PL/EN/DE.
Validation: title, images, variants, EUR price, shipping profile, provider mapping.
Publish gate: active products require all required fields.

StoreLaunchRoadmap.title: Store, platform and VLM
StoreLaunchRoadmap.body: Truthful launch sequence for clothing sales and VLM activation.

store.title: Clothing launch
items: Printful API sync and Tapstitch CSV/link import
Draft products with EUR pricing and shipping rates
Stripe checkout, tax/VAT, seller address and policies final

platform.title: Customer platform
items: Login/account with orders and saved items
Admin panel for products, orders and VLM status

vlm.title: Token activation
items: Base/Sepolia testnet ERC-20, fixed 1B supply, registry-defined fees
Contract address, Registry route/pool and legal review
Mainnet activation only after security and registry completion

VlmModeSwitch.choiceBody: Basic keeps the store quiet. Pro opens the technical room: registry, security, wallet state and AMU signal. You can switch later from the header.
VlmModeSwitch.choiceBasicBody: For browsing drops, archive notes and simple access logic without terminal density.
VlmModeSwitch.choiceProBody: For registry state, security signals, AMU baseline, wallet previews and launch infrastructure.
VlmModeSwitch.choiceFootnote: No transaction is requested. This only changes the interface layer.
VlmModeSwitch.chartBody: To będzie oficjalne okno analityczne VLM po wdrożeniu. Użytkownik nie będzie musiał szukać monety po giełdach, żeby sprawdzić podstawowe dane, holderów albo zweryfikowany status kontraktu.
VlmModeSwitch.chartEmpty: Na razie tylko placeholder: kontrakt, price feed, płynność, holderzy i market cap zostają pending do deploymentu, weryfikacji i review.

VlmGate.proBody: VLM is Velmère's official access layer for private drops, archive unlocking and selected brand privileges. The registry defines contract data and access rules.

archive.label: Archive unlock

engine.label: Access engine

registry.label: Official registry
registry.body: Contract address, audit record and route data appear only after publication in the official registry.

custody.label: Non-custodial
custody.body: Wallet creation and key storage stay inside trusted wallet software. Velmère reads public addresses only.

mode.proBody: A richer view of the VLM launch scenario with side-revealed model notes, wallet custody cues and protocol identity kept intentionally compact.

model.title: Model clarity
model.body: Fixed supply, hard-capped tax design and no post-deploy mint are the baseline.

custody.title: Wallet custody
custody.body: Velmère reads public addresses only and never asks for seed phrases or approvals.

protocol.title: Visual protocol
protocol.body: AMU, rho and prime-field language act as brand-system identity, not security claims.

faqLink.title: Questions moved out of the main flow.
faqLink.body: The public page stays focused. Detailed VLM answers live in a separate data room at the end of the experience.

VlmPublic.proIntro: Pro mode shows the technical VLM access architecture: fixed supply, EVM-first path, non-custodial wallets, tax caps, launch liquidity assumptions, contract plan and security workflow.

Square.title: Velmère Square
Square.body: A restrained feed for drops, access notes and community signals.
Square.moderation: Posts are moderated before publication. Seed sharing, impersonation, scams and financial promises are not allowed.
Square.commentPlaceholder: Add a comment for moderation review

composer.label: Write a Square post
composer.placeholder: Write a calm note for moderation review.
composer.helper: Local drafts remain private until account and moderation are connected.

official.title: First access notes
official.body: The Square gathers drop signals, archive notes and VLM access updates without turning the store into a dashboard.

lookbook.title: Silhouette study: winter graphite
lookbook.body: Heavy cotton, restrained light and quiet proportions define the next editorial direction.

vlm.title: Registry-gated access model
vlm.body: VLM remains separated from clothing checkout and is structured around wallet-linked access, archive and private drop logic.

community.title: Archive request: black-on-black cargos
community.body: A focused request for heavier trousers, matte hardware and a slimmer stacked hem.

hero.title: Access layer, not a price claim.
hero.body: VLM is planned as a private utility layer for drops, archive visibility and selected Velmère privileges. It reads only public wallet state after permission and never asks for custody.

wallet.title: Connect without custody.
wallet.body: Connect a wallet to preview future access states. The page reads a public address only after permission and never asks for a seed phrase.
points: Velmère never stores private keys or seed phrases.
The page can read a public address and native balance after permission.
Access checks stay read-only until the registry is published.

utility.title: Access closer to the maison.

drops.title: Private drops

archive.title: Archive VLM

privileges.title: Selected privileges

risk.body: No public sale, no deployed contract and no audit yet. This page does not promise a price, listing, profit, liquidity or resale value. Legal and MiCA review are required before any public launch.

SizeGuide.title: Size guide
SizeGuide.body: A quick sizing preview. Final measurements depend on the product and cut.
SizeGuide.note: Measurements are draft values and will be finalized per product.

VlmBasicPro.title: Basic uspokaja sklep. Pro otwiera pokój techniczny.
VlmBasicPro.body: Wybierasz powierzchnię pracy: Basic tłumaczy dostęp językiem mody. Pro pokazuje portfel, cyberbezpieczeństwo, sygnał AMU i gotowość rejestru.

items.one: Dropy, archiwum i Square pozostają czytelne bez terminalowego zagęszczenia.
items.two: Portfel jest opcjonalny i pojawia się tylko tam, gdzie naprawdę ma sens.
items.three: Produkt zostaje pierwszy: krój, materiał, dostawa i spokojna forma.

pro.title: Silnik sygnału.
pro.body: Pro to techniczne zaplecze: stan portfela, kontrola cyberbezpieczeństwa, linia AMU, pętle inspirowane wstęgą Möbiusa, rejestr i przyszła weryfikacja kontraktu w jednym terminalu.

items.orbit: Animated EVM-first access orbit with planned network rails.
items.wallet: Podgląd portfela tylko do odczytu, no custody, no seed phrase.
items.security: Audit, multisig and testnet shown as registry conditions.
items.lp: Access route and protocol signal without fake swap UI.
items.registry: Registry-first access records and official contract identity.
items.cyber: Cybersecurity layer: audit lock, multisig status, phishing-resistant contract notes i brak obietnicy „100% ochrony”.
items.amu: AMU baseline keeps the system anchored to the Velmère signal constant.
items.moderation: Angel moderation lane prepares Square review, block and allow decisions.
items.concierge: Angel concierge routing: product guidance, Square moderation and drop signal triage.
items.signals: Signal board for allocation windows, public registry updates and route readiness.
items.vault: Kierunek przyszłości: Velmère Vault jako koncepcja cold-wallet/custody-free — hardware route, szyfrowanie i recovery bez przechowywania seed phrase przez Velmère.
items.forensics: Forensics layer dla stanu portfela, złej sieci, publicznego kontraktu i anomalii dostępu.

VlmBasicPro.basicHint: Basic to spokojna warstwa publiczna: prosty opis tego, co VLM odblokowuje, dlaczego jest oddzielony od checkoutu i jak członek wchodzi bez hałasu.
